text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah!

Today, Tracen Academy is filled with the echoes
of high-pitched screaming. The cause for all this?
Fuji Kiseki.

A long, long line winds around the courtyard like
tangled yarn.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I'll savor every bite of this chocolate
you so kindly made for me.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Fan A
text_block_list.text: I-I hope you like it!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member
text_block_list.text: Okay! Next in line, please!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I-I always go to your races, Fuji! I'm cheering for
you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I'll keep doing my best to make it
worth it for you.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Fan B
text_block_list.text: O-ooh!
choice_data_list: (It must be tough being this popular.)

text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki greets each of her fans with a sincere
smile and charming politeness—the line never
seems to get any shorter.
At night...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Good evening, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness you're still here! I wanted to
come see you at lunch, but I was so busy.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I just thought you might've been expecting
something from me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Keep this a secret from everyone, okay? Happy
Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Where'd it go?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I made some chocolate just for you, but it's gone!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Could I have misplaced it at lunch? But no, I still
had it just a moment ago...

Fuji Kiseki mutters to herself as she frantically
turns all her pockets out, but the chocolate in
question is nowhere to be found.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh no, I must've lost it! I'm so sorry...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: No, it's n—wait! Can you check your pockets too?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Please? Can you just check your right pocket real
quick?

There's no way... I reach into my pocket... and pull
out a beautifully wrapped chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I hope you didn't think that was too sappy.
It's not Valentine's Day every day, so I wanted to
surprise you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: No. Thank you. I look forward to our continued collaboration.

Fuji Kiseki and I spend an unforgettable
Valentine's Day together.

Fuji Kiseki takes out a gorgeous bouquet of
flowers.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You're very welcome! Also... I have a request.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This might sound strange, but may I have one of
these flowers?

I'm not sure why she wants one, but I see no
reason to refuse.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'm just so hungry.
She brings the bouquet to her lips...
And eats a small rose.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Mmm, that was delicious.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I love roses. The thorns can be painful to eat
sometimes, but that only adds to the texture.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My favorite are red roses. Their sweet fruitiness
makes them extra tasty.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: What do you say? Want to try a bite?

She hands me the bouquet, and I hold it dumbly,
unsure what to do.
Then, I notice the sweet smell of caramel.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, have you finally noticed? They're actually
made of sugar!

It's impossible to tell they're fake without getting
a real close look them. Their colors and shapes
look just like the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
They're pretty well made if I do say so myself. I
practiced making them just for today.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to give you a memorable present. How'd
I do?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! I'll call it a success, then!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ahem!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Roses are red, violets are blue, sugar is sweet,
but not as sweet as you."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Here's to more sweet days together, my dearest
Trainer.

Fuji Kiseki and I spend an unforgettable
Valentine's Day together.
